snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.title: Toxic Official Hindi Teaser | Rocking Star Yash | Geetu Mohandas | KVN | Monster Mind Creations
snippet.description:
It’s Gonna Get Crazyyyy !!!

Toxic - A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups in cinemas worldwide on 19-03-2026 in Kannada, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and English

#ToxicTheMovie #Toxic #ToxicTeaser
#DaddyIsHome #ToxicTheMovie 

CAST: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria and Rukmini Vasanth
 
CREW:
Director of Photography: Rajeev Ravi

Production Designer: T. P. Abid

snippet.description:
#smritysinha #dimpalsingh #atharvnahar #ladomadhesiya #anooparora #santoshsrivastava  #shradhhanaval #srishteepathak #jethanikiarrangemarriagedevranikilovemarriage #officialtrailer #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie

 IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH NEELABH TIWARI FILMS (OPC) Pvt Ltd. 

फ़िल्म - जेठानी की अरेंज  मैरेज देवरानी की लव मैरेज
कलाकार - स्मृति  सिन्हा  , डिम्पल  सिंह  , अथवा  नाहर  , लाडो  मधेसिया  अनूप  अरोरा  , संतोष  श्रीवास्तव  , सृष्टि पाठक  , श्रद्धा  नवल  , निशा  तिवारी
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
निर्देशक – प्रवीण कुमार गुदुरु  
लेखक - प्राणनाथ
संगीतकार- ओम  झा  
संकलन - धरम सोनी
छायांकन- माही शेरर्ला
कोरियोग्राफर - कानू मुख़र्जी , सोनू प्रीतम
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - बॉलीवुड उमंग
पार्शव संगीत वो मिक्सिंग - प्रियांशू राज
आर्ट डायरेक्टर - अंजनी तिवारी
सह निर्देशक - सुवेश सिंह अभिजीत श्रीवास्तव
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, नीलाभ तिवारी
 म्यूजिक- IVY ENT
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया झा
IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस  
प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे, हिमांशु चौधरी

B4U - फाइनेंस
संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

Visuals by NFTP  

Producer-Shristi Karki (Shii)

snippet.title: YABI - CHEATER FT. KAVI G ( OFFICIAL MV )
snippet.description:
Yabi The Goat ft. KAVI G
“CHEATER” is a raw take on betrayal, trust, and toxic love wrapped in bold visuals and unapologetic energy.
Yabi The Goat links up with KAVI G to flip the Valentine narrative and expose the other side of love.

Red Chillies Entertainment and Excel Entertainment Present

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla

Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni

Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show — just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

We’ll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy Valentine’s Day ;)

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Tommy Shelby was never destined to be a normal, mortal man. Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man premieres March 6 in select cinemas and March 20 2026 on Netflix.

Pre order the official Peaky Blinders soundtrack, featuring original recordings from Grian Chatten of Fontaines DC, Amy Taylor of Amyl And The Sniffers, Nick Cave, Lankum and Girl In The Year Above. 
https://theimmortalman.lnk.to/Soundtrack

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81319485

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Justin Bieber (Official Video) - Elvish Yadav | Isha Malviya | Anu Amanat | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Flame Music & Nitesh Ujoli proudly present the Official Video of the New Haryanavi Song, "JUSTIN BIEBER" by Elvish Yadav, Anu Amanat. featuring Isha Malviya. The song is penned & composed by Zikar. 

Subscribe To Our Flame Music Channel For New Songs 
✅ Subscribe! ➜    https://www.youtube.com/@UCAy-sQctr13-CvCJBI3-9Zg 
🔔 Click On The Bell + Turn On Notifications.

🎧Stream / Download “JUSTIN BIEBER” Everywhere: https://orcd.co/gx6qqyb
Create Reels: https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/739327165706484

Credits:
Title - Justin Bieber
Starring - Elvish Yadav & Isha Malviya
Singer - Anu Amanat
Rap - Elvish Yadav
Lyricist & Composer - Zikar
Music - Showkidd & OG Sandhu
Project - Sangtar Lally
Producer - Nitesh Ujoli
Design - Roop Kamal & The Visual Vague
Director - Anishh 2.0
DOP - Shubh Sandhu
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar
Asso. Dir - Badbola
Edit & DI - Inkblaze Studios
VFX - Visuals by Potter
1st ac - Gurjeet nigah
2nd ac - vihaan mavi
Line Production - Deepesh Rakheja
Costume Styling - Pooja Malik
Making & Stills - Sandy, Gurii Clicks
MUA - Annu Gautam
Assi. Production - Nitin jindal, Abhishek , Rahul thakur , Rahul kashyap
Art Director- Rajan
Jib - Gourav 
Spot team - Suraj
Team Isha Malviya 
Makeup - Vikram Grover 
Hair - Laddi Hairstylist
Music Label - Flame Music

Team Flame Music - 
Founder - Nitesh Ujoli
Project Manager - Sangtar Lally
Label Management - Gulshan Kamboj (GK Dreamz)
Flame Music Artists - Sunny Yaduvanshi, Akash Dixit



Lyrics of this song "JUSTIN BIEBER" -
 
Female - 
Ghadi me baje 5 sham ke chore ka na pata thikana
Roley hath me saje jaat ke lambo niche sheher diwana
Ve m rehna tere naal meherma, ve m tere bul di khayal meherma
Mere ve har haal rahega dil ke bhitar tu
Balma ainak kali pehen ke lage justin bieber tu-2

Male - 
Gaadi Aadi tedi chaale 
system maare naam te haale 
Bolero aale maare sale 
Bteyu g weagon te aare
Konsa bole maare aage 
Us bande na dar na laage 
Haryana se hollywood takk
Rukka raoshab ka baaje  
Ham to desi ghee aale
Ye saale khali bore hain
Naam ki gelya leke fere
Katiye pagal hore hain
Re Inki game ghuma rakhi
Lathi 4 chadha rakhi
Ye jo bane fire  hai saap 
Yaar ne been baja rakhi

Female - 
Gaadi lakh dallar ki niche duniya fan bna rakhi
Apna chain mai hari tne mahri neend uda rakhi
Sare deewane mere piche m diwani tere peeche
Pakad le baiyan dil me saiyan teri jagah bna rakhi
Jab chale kaafila caara ka kath challe gel hazara ka
Mne ghana favourite lage jo tu pehne outfit zara ka
O mne krega pagal saiyan mera bne kaatil josa lave ittar tu

O balma ainak kali pehen ke lage justin beiber tu-2

Male - 
Ghne handle kre ilaake yaar tera 
System phaad ke raakhe yaar tera 
Kyi bando ko hazam na hove 
Duniya peeche rakhe yaar tera 

desi chore gaama ke 
Zikar hai mehnge daama me 
Niche chahe g Wagon hai 
FAN HAI AAJ BHI YAMHA KE 

Seedhi seedhi bat h baby
Na kise cheez ki ghaat h baby
Jiske jyada khaaj lagri
Mere pas ilaaj h baby

Jaave mall trackter pe 
Chora kam na kisi bhi actor te Tere shehar m aave raosahab jab
Bawli Jaam lag ja h sector me

Meri Ammi dhunde var mere tayi
Saakh modti chali m
Tere yara ki bhabhi banna teri bnu
gharwali m
Na kisi bat ki fikr krenge maze sath
me zikar krenge
Tere sath hi jana chahti saiyan trip
pe bali m
Haath me rakh hath bawle pyar ki
kar 2 bat bawle
Pache na ho nyu...o balma
O balma ainak kali pehen ke lage
justin beiber tu-2

snippet.title: The Kerala Story 2 Goes Beyond| Official Trailer| Vipul Amrutlal Shah| Kamakhya Singh| Aashin A Shah
snippet.description:
They targeted our daughters. 
They broke their trust.
They stole their futures.

This time, we do not stay silent. The story goes beyond.

Is bar sahenge nahi… ladenge.

#TheKeralaStory2GoesBeyond – Official Trailer 

🎬 In Cinemas on 27th February, 2026

Production company : 
Sunshine Pictures

Produced by: Vipul Amrutlal Shah
Directed by: Kamakhya Narayan Singh
Co-Produced by: Aashin A. Shah, Ravichand Nallappa

Written by: Amarnath Jha, Vipul Amrutlal Shah
Music & Background Score: Mannan Shaah
Lyrics: Manoj Muntashir

Guest Music Director: (Kanha Re Kanha) Rahul Suhas
Choreography: Ganesh Acharya
Editor: Sanjay Sharma

Sound Designer: Manas Choudhury
Production Designer: Juhi Talmaki
Director of Photography: Abhijeet Chaudhari

Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Costume Designer: Radhika Mehra
Action Director: Paramjeet Singh Pamma

Publicity Designs: Himanshu Nanda & Rahul Nanda
Post Production Head: Bhanjaya Sahu
DI: Redefine

DI Colourist: Smanoj C.P.K Verma
VFX: Zero Gravity
Re-Recording Mixer: Bibin Dev (DNB Studios)

Media Consultant: Spice
Make Up & Prosthetics Designer: Shrikant Desai

1st Assistant Director: Jayesh Khatwani
Associate Line Producer: Joseph D’Mello
Visual Promotions: Sahil S Sai


#TheKeralaStory2 #GoesBeyond #OfficialTeaser #IndianCinema #27thFebruary #BeyondTheKeralaStory

snippet.title: CID Bahu | सी.आई.डी बहू | Official Trailer | Amrapali Dubey | New Bhojpuri Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Movie: CID Bahu
Star Cast: Amrapali Dubey, Shweta Verma, Rambha Sahani,  Ayaz Khan, Vidhya Singh, Raj Singh Rajpoot, Puja Thakur, Sahil Siddique And Other
Banner: Shreyash Films PVT
Music On: Enter 10 Rangeela
Producer: Prem Rai
Writer & Director: Ananjay Raghuraj 
Dialogue & Screenplay: Arbind Tiwari 
Co-Producer: Shaista Khan  
Music: Sajan Mishra & Om Jha  
Lyrics: Dharam Hindustani, Durgesh Bhatt
Cinematography: Venket Mahesh 
Editor: Gurjant Singh
Choreographer: M K Gupta (Joy) 
Art: Nazir Shaikh
Costume: Vidha-Vishnu 
Post Production: Audio Lab
Background Music: Aslam Surti
Executive Producer: Nihal Singh
D.I & VFX: Mohit Kumar 
Production Controller: Amarjeet Das
Assistant Director: Vivek Kumar 
Stills: Kuber
Design: Narsu

मूवी: सी.आई.डी बहू
स्टार कास्ट: आम्रपाली दुबे, श्वेता वर्मा, रंभा साहनी, अयाज़ खान, विद्या सिंह, राज सिंह राजपूत, पूजा ठाकुर, साहिल सिद्दीकी और अन्य
बैनर: श्रेयश फिल्म्स PVT
म्यूज़िक ऑन: एंटर 10 रंगीला
निर्माता: प्रेम राय
कथा और निर्देशक: अनंजय रघुराज
पटकथा व संवाद : अरबिंद तिवारी
सह निर्माता: शाइस्ता खान
संगीत: साजन मिश्रा और ओम झा
गीत: धरम हिंदुस्तानी, दुर्गेश भट्ट
छायांकन: वेंकेट महेश
संकलन: गुरजंत सिंह
नृत्य: एम के गुप्ता (जॉय)
कला: नज़ीर शेख
कॉस्ट्यूम: विधा-विष्णु
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन: ऑडियो लैब
पार्श्व संगीत: असलम सुरती
कार्यकारी निर्माता: निहाल सिंह
डी.आई. व  वी एफ एक्स : मोहित कुमार
निर्माण नियंत्रक: अमरजीत दास
सहायक निर्देशक: विवेक कुमार
स्टिल्स: कुबेर
डिज़ाईन: नर्सू

snippet.title: Dhurandhar 2 Beware 😱 Toxic Official Hindi Teaser REACTION | Rocking Star Yash | Geetu Mohandas
snippet.description:
Dhurandhar 2 Beware 😱 Toxic Official Hindi Teaser REACTION | Rocking Star Yash | Geetu Mohandas

It’s Gonna Get Crazyyyy 😱🔥

Dhurandhar 2 Beware Toxic Official Hindi Teaser Reaction by Desi Bros TV. Rocking Star Yash returns with one of the most awaited pan-India films “Toxic – A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups”. In this video we share our honest first reaction, review, breakdown and thoughts on the teaser, Yash’s powerful look, background music by Ravi Basrur and the dark cinematic world created by Geetu Mohandas.

🔥 Buzz hai ki Rocking Star Yash Toxic me double role me nazar aa sakte hain, jo movie ko aur bhi next-level bana deta hai.

⚔️ Interestingly, Toxic is set to clash at the box office with Dhurandhar 2 on 19 March 2026 — one of the biggest cinematic battles of the year.

Toxic releases in cinemas worldwide on 19 March 2026 in Kannada, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and English.

⭐ CAST
Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria, Rukmini Vasanth

🎬 Directed by Geetu Mohandas
🎵 Music by Ravi Basrur
🏢 Produced by KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

अगर video pasand aaye to LIKE 👍 SHARE 🔁 SUBSCRIBE ❤️

snippet.title: Official Video - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe - Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Official Video - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe - Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026 
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake | Broken Vibes | Heart Touching Qawwali Sad Song | Emotional Pain Song
snippet.description:
Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake ek dil ko chhoo lene wala emotional song hai, jo un logon ke liye hai jinka dard lafzon se zyada gehra hota hai.
Ye gaana un yaadon, un aansuon aur us khamoshi ko bayan karta hai jise koi samajh nahi paata.
Agar aap broken vibes, heart touching sad songs, aur deep emotional music pasand karte hain, to ye song aapke dil tak zaroor pahuchega 💔
🎧 Headphones lagakar sunein aur apne dard ko mehsoos karein…

snippet.description:
Experience the serene and soothing vibes of Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram in a calming lo-fi rendition by Pawan Brijwasi. This version beautifully blends the timeless devotion of the classic Sanskrit bhajan with mellow lo-fi beats, creating a perfect backdrop for meditation, relaxation, or introspective moments.

Subscribe us :- https://bit.ly/3EESq5h

► Singer - Pawan Brijwasi
► Music - Suraj Vishwakarma

➤ Sub Label - Ambey
➤Parent Label(Publisher) - Shubham Audio Video Private Limited
93412-DVT_VNM/18481-TDVT-93412

संसारसारं भुजगेन्द्रहारम्।

Bham Bhavani Sahitam Namami...

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Neele phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terе liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye…

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: POWER STAR PAWAN SINGH - SATRANGI SALWARWA | LATEST BHOJPURI HOLI SONG 2026 FT. MAHIMA SINGH
snippet.description:
गरदा उड़वले आ गइनी हऽ “सतरंगी सलवारवा” लेके, जेकरा में पावर स्टार पवन सिंह आ शिवानी सिंह के धमाकेदार आवाज में होली के रंग, प्यार आ मस्ती के जबरदस्त झलक मिले ला। पवन सिंह आ महिमा सिंह के शानदार केमिस्ट्री एह गीत के अउरी मजेदार बना देले बा।

Singers: Power Star Pawan Singh , Shivani Singh

snippet.description:
Yeh sirf ek Minecraft video nahi hai… 😢
Yeh hai Carry ki sad story, jisme uski zindagi ka wo sach dikhaya gaya hai jo dil tod deta hai 💔

Is video mein Carry apni kahani khud sunata hai — akelapan, dard aur khamoshi ke saath.
Agar aapko emotional Minecraft stories, sad gaming content, aur heart touching Hindi videos pasand hain,
toh is video ko end tak zaroor dekhiye 👀❤️

⚠️ Warning: Last scene dekh kar aankhen bhar aa sakti hain 😭

Support ke liye Like ❤️ | Comment 💬 | Share 🔁 | Subscribe 🔔
Aapki ek comment Carry ke liye bahut important hai 🙏

#matimraihu #newnepalisong #lovesongnepali

[ Sansar Feriyo Timro Ujyalole 
Man Mandirbho Timro Aagamanle ] - 2 
Badliyeka chhan Mero Ranga Haru 
Kaha Nai Janchhu Ma Timrai Ta Hu 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahirahu la 
Jati Badha , Aayeni Timrai Aghi Hula 

Bihanile Ghaam , Saajhale Juno 
Parkhirahe Jhai Parkhirahu 
Khola Jhai Timi , Kinara Bhaye Ma 
Bagirahnu , Malai Chhoyi Rahanu

Bagi Bagi Bagi Rahos

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahula

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey – Young And Beautiful (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎧 Welcome to Paradise 🌴
Your Home For The Best Urban Music With Lyrics!

“Lana Del Rey – Young And Beautiful” Lyrics / Lyric Video brought to you by Urban Paradise

⏬ “Might Just - Ella Mai” Out Now: 
https://24kgoldn.lnk.to/Prada

⚡️  This just how it is, no more what it was

🔔 Click the bell to stay updated on the best Lyrics / Lyric Videos from Urban Paradise!

✅ Follow all the music from Paradise Music on Spotify Playlists here!
https://open.spotify.com/user/wavemus​...

▶️ Urban Paradise:
https://www.instagram.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
https://www.facebook.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
https://twitter.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
Artist Links:
📺 Zara Larsson YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@A$AP Rocky

[Verse 1]
I've seen the world, done it all
Had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
 
[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Verse 2]
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now

[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face and electric soul

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Bridge]
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that You'll let him in
Father, tell me if You can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds

[Chorus]
And will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothin' but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Outro]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me when I'm not young and beautiful?

Tags
#LanaDelRey #YoungAndBeautiful #NewMusic #PopMusic #Lyrics #LyricVideo #OfficialLyrics #LanaDelReyMusic #TrendingMusic #TopHits2025 #NewMusic2025 #UrbanParadise

Cinnamon in my teeth
From your kiss
You're touching me
All the pills that you take

You try to push me out
But I just find my way back in
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me out
I win

Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

snippet.title: Khesari Lal Yadav New Song 2026 | Choli Bheej Jata | Shilpi Raj | Ft. Priya Raghuwanshi | Holi Video
snippet.description:
Presenting Trending Star Khesari Lal Yadav , Shilpi Raj ka new Bhojpuri Holi Song Choli Bheej Jata ( चोली भीज जाता) Ft. Priya Raghuwanshi. Khesari Lal Yadav aur Priya Raghuwanshi ki bhojpuri jodi Choli Bheej Jata ( चोली भीज जाता ) song aap sabhi ke dil pe raj karega aur 4 ke holi me dhamal machayega.

►Song - Choli Bhij Jata
 ►Singer - Khesari Lal Yadav, Shilpi Raj 
►Featuring - Priya raghuwanshi 
►Lyrics - Abhishek Bhojpuriya 
►Music Director - Aarya Sharma 
►Director - Pawan Pal 
►Video by - Wailens Production 
►Editor - Angad Pal 
►D.I - Rohit Singh 
►Choreographer - Kuldeep Vishakha 
►DOP - Dileep chaurasiya 
►Makeup - Amit Singh Team 
►Hair - Ranjan Kumar 
►Dance Group - Ps Dance Group 
►Light - Ganpati Light

🌈 Holi आ Khesari… मतलब रंग आ धमाका!  NEW BHOJPURI HOLI SONG
Agar aap Bhojpuri Holi song, latest Holi geet, Khesari Lal Yadav new song, Holi special Bhojpuri gana, ya Bhojpuri Holi aap ke liye aa gaya hai.

Daily Bhojpuri gaano ke update paye hamare What' App channel par
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbBIHPf3bbV2sWiU1a2l

Lyrics
लागता जवानी में बावे कवनो बाधा
छुवला प कहा तारु आई हो दादा 2 
तेज धड़कन तहार धड़केला सीना हा सीना आरे सीना में 

चोली भिज जाता राजा जी पसीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 
मोबिल पलटी करS लेके आवा टीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 

हां मन मदहोश बा,जागल जोश बा 
भइल बाड़ू सरसो के फूल हो 
हां हा ऐ हमार पति सम्पति के छती होई 
करेला ना गति एको रति पागल मती होई 
तहरा खानी भूख नाही बा कवनो हसीना हसीना हो हसीना में 
चोली भिज जाता राजा जी पसीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 
मोबिल पलटी करS लेके आवा टीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 

धन अभिषेक के मरेलु चुम्मा फेक के 
संजय आ सोनू से ना लाज बावे 
लागता ना शर्म हमार गर्म मिजाज बावे 
तोहसे उखाड़त कुछ ना राजा रंगबाज़ बावे 
मजा बेसी पइबू खेसरिया कमीना हो कमीना हS कमीना में 
चोली भिज जाता राजा जी पसीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 
मोबिल पलटी करS लेके आवा टीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: ROBLOX JUMP TO STEAL BRAINROTS!
snippet.description:
Today I played roblox jump for brianrots. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Main Hoon | Battle Of Galwan | Salman Khan, Chitrangada | Apoorva L | Shreya G, Ayaan L | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
This Valentine’s Day has its soundtrack. Main Hoon, sung by Shreya Ghoshal and Ayaan Lall, celebrates love in its purest form. A melody that speaks when words fall short, and feelings run deep.

#MainHoon Song Out Now!
#SalmanKhan #BattleOfGalwan

snippet.title: Testing 100% REAL Viral Hacks in Escape Tsunami For Brainrots..🤯🌊(Hindi)
snippet.description:
🌊 Escape Tsunami just got CRAZY!

In this video, I test NEW VIRAL hacks in Escape Tsunami for Brainrots to see if they actually work or if they’re just fake TikTok glitches 🤯
Some of these hacks are INSANELY overpowered, while others completely FAIL 💀

🔥 What happens when Brainrots use secret hacks against a giant tsunami?
👉 Watch till the end to see the most broken hack!

If you enjoy Escape Tsunami, Brainrot Roblox, and viral Roblox hacks, make sure to:
✅ LIKE
✅ SUBSCRIBE
✅ TURN ON NOTIFICATIONS

💬 Comment which hack worked the best!

snippet.description:
Please Click To Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2LnYKVu

Song: Namo Namo
Singer: Amit Trivedi
Lyricist: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Composed & Produced by Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios  Mumbai  - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar  
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed & Mastered by Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai 
Assisted by Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula
Musician Names:-
Programmed -  Amit Trivedi, Raja Rasaily & Krishna Kishor
Percussions - Krishna Kishor
Flute - Vishnu Vijay
Sitar - Kishor 
Mandolin & Strings - Seenu 
Backing Vocals - Rajiv Sundaresan & Suhas Sawant

RSVP & Guy In The Sky Pictures present Kedarnath Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput, Sara Ali Khan, Nitish Bharadwaj, Alka Amin, Sonali Sachdev, Pooja Gor, Nishant Dahiya

Directed by Abhishek Kapoor 
Produced by Ronnie Screwvala & Pragya Kapoor 
Co-Produced by Abhishek Kapoor & Abhishek Nayyar 
Story: Abhishek Kapoor & Kanika Dhillon 
Screenplay & Dialogue: Kanika Dhillon 
Music: Amit Trivedi 
DOP: Tushar Kanti Ray 
Action Director: Dave Judge & Sunil Rodrigues 
Editor: Chandan Arora 
Background Score: Hitesh Sonik 
Sound Designer: Allwin Rego & Sanjay Maurya.

Lyrics:

Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya Bhalaa…
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke Chalaa…

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O O…)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O O…)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O O…)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O O…)

Kya Samay… Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
Mahaanta… Mahaanta…

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi Mera…

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi Tera…
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O O…)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O O…)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O O…)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O O…)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon Mein… Jataaon Mein…

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Maanga Kuch Kabhi Nahi
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tune Sirf Hai Diya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Samudra Manthan Ka Tha Samay Jo Aa Pada
Dwand Dono Lok Me Vish-Amrit Pe Tha Chhida
Amrit Sabhi Main Baant Ke
Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

snippet.title: I Gifted My Wife One of the Best FC MOBILE Squads!
snippet.description:
Today, my wife takes over my FC Mobile account! She's been practicing her Head-to-Head skills, but needed a better team for defending. So, I decided to gift her one of my old accounts stacked with 54 BILLION coins, 161,000 Gems, and 41,000 FC Points!

We do a massive pack opening across the Lunar New Year, Ramadan, and Ultimate Team of the Year (UTOTY) events. Did she get that beginner's luck? We managed to pull some insane 117 OVR cards, including UTOTY Mbappé and Raphinha! To finish off the 123 OVR squad, we hit the market to buy absolute legends like Ruud Gullit, Rio Ferdinand, and Gianluigi Buffon.

Highlights from this video:

-Testing our pack luck in the Lunar New Year & Ramadan events.
-Pulling massive UTOTY walkouts.
-Spending 17 Billion coins on the transfer market.
-Upgrading the final squad to 122 OVR.

📩 Business Inquiries → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

fr-FR.title: J'ai offert à ma femme l'une des meilleures équipes FC MOBILE !
fr-FR.description:
Aujourd'hui, ma femme prend les commandes de mon compte FC Mobile ! Elle s'entraîne en face-à-face, mais il lui fallait une meilleure équipe pour la défense. Du coup, je lui ai offert un de mes anciens comptes, rempli à ras bord de 54 milliards de crédits, 161 000 gemmes et 41 000 points FC !

On ouvre des packs à gogo pendant les événements du Nouvel An lunaire, du Ramadan et de l'Équipe Ultime de l'Année (UTOTY). A-t-elle eu de la chance ? On a réussi à obtenir des cartes incroyables à 117 de note générale, dont Mbappé et Raphinha UTOTY ! Pour compléter notre équipe à 123 de note générale, on a fait un tour sur le marché des transferts pour acheter des légendes comme Ruud Gullit, Rio Ferdinand et Gianluigi Buffon.

Les meilleurs moments de cette vidéo :

- On teste notre chance aux packs pendant les événements du Nouvel An lunaire et du Ramadan.

- On obtient des joueurs UTOTY de folie. - Dépenses de 17 milliards de crédits sur le marché des transferts.

- Amélioration de l'équipe finale à 122 de note générale.

📩 Demandes commerciales → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

de-DE.title: Ich habe meiner Frau eines der besten FC Mobile-Teams geschenkt!
de-DE.description:
Heute übernimmt meine Frau meinen FC Mobile-Account! Sie hat fleißig ihre Head-to-Head-Fähigkeiten trainiert, brauchte aber ein besseres Verteidigungsteam. Deshalb habe ich ihr einen meiner alten Accounts geschenkt, vollgepackt mit 54 Milliarden Münzen, 161.000 Juwelen und 41.000 FC-Punkten!

Wir öffnen unzählige Packs während der Events zum Mondneujahr, Ramadan und Ultimate Team of the Year (UTOTY). Hatte sie Anfängerglück? Wir haben einige unglaubliche Karten mit einer Gesamtbewertung von 117 gezogen, darunter UTOTY Mbappé und Raphinha! Um unser Team mit einer Gesamtbewertung von 123 zu vervollständigen, haben wir uns auf dem Markt absolute Legenden wie Ruud Gullit, Rio Ferdinand und Gianluigi Buffon geholt.

Highlights aus diesem Video:

- Unser Pack-Glück bei den Events zum Mondneujahr und Ramadan testen.

- Riesige UTOTY-Karten ziehen.

- 17 Milliarden Münzen für Transfers ausgegeben.

- Den Kader auf eine Gesamtbewertung von 122 aufgewertet.

it.title: Ho regalato a mia moglie una delle migliori squadre FC MOBILE!
it.description:
Oggi mia moglie prende in gestione il mio account FC Mobile! Ha migliorato le sue abilità negli scontri diretti, ma aveva bisogno di una squadra migliore in difesa. Così, ho deciso di regalarle uno dei miei vecchi account con 54 MILIARDI di monete, 161.000 gemme e 41.000 punti FC!

Facciamo un'enorme apertura di pacchetti durante gli eventi del Capodanno Lunare, del Ramadan e dell'Ultimate Team of the Year (UTOTY). Ha avuto la fortuna del principiante? Siamo riusciti a pescare delle carte da 117 OVR incredibili, tra cui Mbappé e Raphinha di UTOTY! Per completare la squadra da 123 OVR, siamo andati al mercato per acquistare leggende assolute come Ruud Gullit, Rio Ferdinand e Gianluigi Buffon.

Momenti salienti di questo video:

-Mettiamo alla prova la fortuna del nostro pacchetto durante gli eventi del Capodanno Lunare e del Ramadan.
-Facciamo uscire di scena enormi durante gli eventi di UTOTY.
- Spendere 17 miliardi di monete sul mercato trasferimenti.
- Migliorare la rosa finale a 122 OVR.

📩 Richieste commerciali → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

es-US.title: ¡Le regalé a mi esposa uno de los mejores equipos de FC MOBILE!
es-US.description:
Hoy, mi esposa se hace cargo de mi cuenta de FC Mobile. Ha estado practicando sus habilidades en los enfrentamientos directos, pero necesitaba un mejor equipo para defender. Así que decidí regalarle una de mis antiguas cuentas, ¡con 54 mil millones de monedas, 161 000 gemas y 41 000 puntos FC!

Realizamos una gran apertura de sobres durante los eventos del Año Nuevo Lunar, Ramadán y el Equipo del Año (UTOTY). ¿Tuvo esa suerte de principiante? ¡Conseguimos cartas increíbles con 117 OVR, incluyendo a Mbappé y Raphinha UTOTY! Para completar la plantilla de 123 OVR, fuimos al mercado a comprar leyendas absolutas como Ruud Gullit, Rio Ferdinand y Gianluigi Buffon.

Lo más destacado de este vídeo:

- Probando nuestra suerte de sobres en los eventos del Año Nuevo Lunar y Ramadán.
- Conseguimos grandes victorias en el UTOTY. -Gastar 17 mil millones de monedas en el mercado de fichajes.
-Mejorar la plantilla final a 122 GLB.

id.title: Aku menghadiahkan istriku salah satu skuad FC MOBILE terbaik!
id.description:
Hari ini, istriku mengambil alih akun FC Mobile-ku! Dia sudah berlatih kemampuan Head-to-Head-nya, tetapi membutuhkan tim yang lebih baik untuk bertahan. Jadi, aku memutuskan untuk menghadiahkan salah satu akun lamaku yang berisi 54 Miliar koin, 161.000 Permata, dan 41.000 Poin FC!

Kami melakukan pembukaan paket besar-besaran selama event Tahun Baru Imlek, Ramadan, dan Ultimate Team of the Year (UTOTY). Apakah dia mendapatkan keberuntungan pemula? Kami berhasil mendapatkan beberapa kartu 117 OVR yang luar biasa, termasuk UTOTY Mbappé dan Raphinha! Untuk melengkapi skuad 123 OVR, kami pergi ke pasar untuk membeli legenda seperti Ruud Gullit, Rio Ferdinand, dan Gianluigi Buffon.

Sorotan dari video ini:

-Menguji keberuntungan paket kami di event Tahun Baru Imlek & Ramadan.

-Mendapatkan pemain UTOTY yang luar biasa.

-Menghabiskan 17 Miliar koin di pasar transfer.

-Meningkatkan peringkat skuad akhir menjadi 122 OVR.


📩 Pertanyaan Bisnis → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

pt-BR.title: Dei de presente para minha esposa um dos melhores times do FC Mobile!
pt-BR.description:
Hoje, minha esposa assumiu minha conta do FC Mobile! Ela estava treinando suas habilidades no modo Frente a Frente, mas precisava de um time melhor para a defesa. Então, decidi presenteá-la com uma das minhas contas antigas, repleta de 54 BILHÕES de moedas, 161.000 Gemas e 41.000 Pontos FC!

Fizemos uma abertura massiva de pacotes durante os eventos do Ano Novo Lunar, Ramadã e Time do Ano Supremo (UTOTY). Será que ela teve sorte de principiante? Conseguimos tirar cartas incríveis de 117 de GER, incluindo Mbappé e Raphinha UTOTY! Para completar o time de 123 de GER, fomos ao mercado comprar lendas absolutas como Ruud Gullit, Rio Ferdinand e Gianluigi Buffon.

Destaques deste vídeo:

- Testando nossa sorte nos pacotes durante os eventos do Ano Novo Lunar e Ramadã.

- Tirando cartas incríveis do UTOTY.
-Gastando 17 bilhões de moedas no mercado de transferências.
-Melhorando o elenco final para 122 de GER.

- 📩 Consultas comerciais → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

hi.title: मैंने अपनी पत्नी को एफसी मोबाइल की सबसे बेहतरीन स्क्वाड में से एक उपहार में दी!
hi.description:
आज मेरी पत्नी ने मेरा FC Mobile अकाउंट संभाला! वह हेड-टू-हेड गेम खेलने का अभ्यास कर रही थी, लेकिन उसे डिफेंस के लिए एक बेहतर टीम की ज़रूरत थी। इसलिए मैंने उसे अपना एक पुराना अकाउंट गिफ्ट कर दिया, जिसमें 54 बिलियन कॉइन, 161,000 जेम्स और 41,000 FC पॉइंट्स थे!

हमने चंद्र नव वर्ष, रमज़ान और अल्टीमेट टीम ऑफ़ द ईयर (UTOTY) इवेंट्स में ज़बरदस्त पैक खोले। क्या उसे शुरुआती किस्मत मिली? हमें कुछ शानदार 117 OVR कार्ड मिले, जिनमें UTOTY के म्बाप्पे और राफिन्हा भी शामिल थे! 123 OVR की टीम को पूरा करने के लिए, हमने मार्केट से रुड गुलिट, रियो फर्नांड और जियानलुइगी बफॉन जैसे दिग्गज खिलाड़ियों को खरीदा।

इस वीडियो की मुख्य बातें:

- चंद्र नव वर्ष और रमज़ान इवेंट्स में अपनी पैक किस्मत आज़माना।

- UTOTY के ज़बरदस्त कार्ड्स निकालना।

- ट्रांसफर मार्केट पर 17 बिलियन कॉइन खर्च किए।

- फाइनल स्क्वाड को 122 OVR तक अपग्रेड किया।

📩 व्यावसायिक पूछताछ → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

snippet.title: Samjhawan - Arijit Singh & Shreya Ghoshal (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🍕Samjhawan - Arijit Singh & Shreya Ghoshal (Lyrics)

🍕Lyrics:

Nahi Jeena Tere Baaju
Nahi Jeena Nahi Jeena
Nahi Jeena Tere Baaju
Nahi Jeena Nahi Jeena

Nahi Jeena Tere Baaju
Nahi Jeena Nahi Jeena
Nahi Jeena Tere Baaju
Nahi Jeena Nahi Jeena

Main Tainu Samjhawan Ki
Na Tere Bina Lagda Jee

Main Tainu Samjhawan Ki
Na Tere Bina Lagda Jee
Tu Ki Jaane Pyar Mera
Main Karun Intezar Tera
Tu Dil Tui-Yon Jaan Meri

Main Tainu Samjhawan Ki
Na Tere Bina Lagda Jee
Tu Ki Jaane Pyar Mera
Main Karun Intezar Tera
Tu Dil Tui-Yon Jaan Meri

Main Tainu Samjhawan Ki
Na Tere Bina Lagda Jee

Mere Dil Ne Chun Laiyaa Ne
Tere Dil Diyaan Raahan
Tu Jo Mere Naal Tu Rehta
Turpe Meriyaan Saaha
Jeena Mera Haaye

Hunn Hai Tera Ki Main Karaan
Tu Kar Aitbaar Mera
Main Karun Intezar Tera
Tu Dil Tui-Yon Jaan Meri

Main Tainu Samjhawan Ki
Na Tere Bina Lagda Jee

Ve Changa Nahio Keeta Beeba
Ve Changa Nahio Keeta Beeba
Dil Mera Tod Ke

Ve Bada Pachtaiyan Ankhan
Ve Bada Pachtaiyan Ankhan
Naal Tere Jod Ke

Tainu Chadd Ke Kitthe Jawan
Tu Mera Parchhawan
Tere Mukhde Vich Hi Main Taan
Rab Nu Apne Paawan

Meri Duaa.. Haaye
Sajda Tera Kardi Sada
Tu Sunn Iqraar Mera
Main Karun Intezar Tera
Tu Dil Tui-Yon Jaan Meri

Main Tainu Samjhawan Ki
Na Tere Bina Lagda Jee

Aquí tienes, presiona "Notificarme" para no perderte nada.

¡Milte hain kal! 🌚

🤗 Sígueme en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

Espero que hayas disfrutado el video. Si es así, dale a "me gusta" y compártelo.

लो-फाई भजन पारंपरिक भक्ति संगीत को लो-फाई संगीत के सुखदायक, उदासीन गुणों के साथ जोड़ता है। इसमें शांत धुन और कोमल लय होती है जो शांति और आध्यात्मिक चिंतन की भावना पैदा करती है। वाद्य-यंत्र में अक्सर तबला, हारमोनियम, सितार और बांसुरी जैसे ध्वनिक वाद्य शामिल होते हैं, जो विनाइल क्रैकल या परिवेशी ध्वनियों जैसे सूक्ष्म लो-फाई तत्वों पर परतदार होते हैं। स्वर, चाहे एकल हों या कोरस, दिल से भावनाओं के साथ भक्ति गीत प्रस्तुत करते हैं, जो एक ध्यानपूर्ण और चिंतनशील मूड को प्रोत्साहित करते हैं। यह संलयन एक अनूठा सुनने का अनुभव बनाता है जो प्राचीन आध्यात्मिक परंपराओं को समकालीन लो-फाई सौंदर्यशास्त्र के साथ मिलाता है, जो आंतरिक सद्भाव और श्रद्धा में एक शांत यात्रा प्रदान करता है।

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

लो-फाई भजन पारंपरिक भक्ति संगीत को लो-फाई संगीत के सुखदायक, उदासीन गुणों के साथ जोड़ता है। इसमें शांत धुन और कोमल लय होती है जो शांति और आध्यात्मिक चिंतन की भावना पैदा करती है। वाद्य-यंत्र में अक्सर तबला, हारमोनियम, सितार और बांसुरी जैसे ध्वनिक वाद्य शामिल होते हैं, जो विनाइल क्रैकल या परिवेशी ध्वनियों जैसे सूक्ष्म लो-फाई तत्वों पर परतदार होते हैं। स्वर, चाहे एकल हों या कोरस, दिल से भावनाओं के साथ भक्ति गीत प्रस्तुत करते हैं, जो एक ध्यानपूर्ण और चिंतनशील मूड को प्रोत्साहित करते हैं। यह संलयन एक अनूठा सुनने का अनुभव बनाता है जो प्राचीन आध्यात्मिक परंपराओं को समकालीन लो-फाई सौंदर्यशास्त्र के साथ मिलाता है, जो आंतरिक सद्भाव और श्रद्धा में एक शांत यात्रा प्रदान करता है।

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

snippet.title: I Explored the World's Largest Minecraft Server
snippet.description:
truly an unstable smp

I Explored the World's Largest Minecraft Server

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨ @FlameFragsMC 
➜   @ParrotX2 
➜   @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨ @wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc @JadenMAN 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)
https://www.youtube.com/@nombra101 (FlameFrags motif right before egg shows up LOL)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

🔥 Presenting “Maine Pyar Tumhi Se Kiya Hai” by Vik4s M!
A high-energy Hindi DJ Dance Remix with powerful beats, Bollywood vibes, and club-style visuals made for parties, reels, and dance floors.

This remix blends classic Bollywood feel with modern DJ bass and drops, perfect for weddings, dance videos, DJ sets, and celebration playlists.

🔔 Follow Vik4s M for more Hindi DJ Remixes:

Instagram: https://instagram.com/djvik4s

🔥 Vibe: Party • Wedding • Dancefloor • Festive

snippet.title: [NP] PUBG MOBILE CAMPUS CLUB NEPAL 2026 – PLAYOFFS DAY 1 | The Opening Fire
snippet.description:
The road from Campus to Conqueror begins today. 🏆🔥

Welcome to Day 1 of the PUBG MOBILE Campus Club Nepal 2026 Playoffs, where 20 top college teams enter the battleground with one mission — secure a spot in the Top 16 and qualify for the Grand Finals.

The pressure starts now.
Four days of Round Robin action.
Every match counts. Every point matters.

A strong start today could shape the entire playoff journey.
A slow start? There’s no room for mistakes in this race.

💰 Total Prize Pool: NPR 350,000
📅 Playoffs: 20–23 February
🏁 Grand Finals: 27–28 February
🎮 Format: 4-Day Round Robin
🏫 Total Teams: 20
✅ Top 16 qualify for Finals

🗺️ Day 1 Map Rotation

Group DIvision:

GROUP A
ISMT COLLEGE
STAMFORD COLLEGE
PCPS COLLEGE
HETAUDA CITY COLLEGE

GROUP B
THE BRITISH COLLEGE
MODEL INSTITUTE TECHNOLOGY
MADAN BHANDARI COLLEGE
KINGS COLLEGE

GROUP C
IMS COLLEGE
LORD BUDDHA EDU FOUNDATION
PHOENIX COLLEGE
INTERNATIONAL COLLEGE

GROUP D
BUTWAL KALIKA CAMPUS
BUTWAL MODEL COLLEGE
POKHARA COLLEGE OF MANAGEMENT
GLOBAL COLLEGE INTERNATIONAL

GROUP E
TEXAS COLLEGE
NEPATHYA COLLEGE
CHITWAN COLLEGE OF TECHNOLOGY
KATHMANDU MODEL COLLEGE


⚔️ Match 1 – Erangel (Groups A, B, C, D)
⚔️ Match 2 – Miramar (Groups A, B, C, E)
⚔️ Match 3 – Erangel (Groups A, B, D, E)
⚔️ Match 4 – Rondo (Groups A, C, D, E)
⚔️ Match 5 – Miramar (Groups B, C, D, E)

The leaderboard begins to take shape today.
Rivalries ignite. Momentum builds. Dreams are tested.

This is where it starts.
This is where contenders rise.

🔥 PUBG MOBILE Campus Club Nepal 2026
🏆 Campus to Conqueror

#PMCC2026 #PUBGMNP #PUBGMobileCampusClub #CampusToConqueror

snippet.title: Meri Ujeli (Official Music Video) -  Pahenlo Batti Muni
snippet.description:
Meri Ujeli is an ode to the brightness and warmth we’ve received from all those we have loved and those who have loved us. 

Stream the HQ Audio here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/meriujeli-pbm

Lyrics:
आकाशले त्यागेको पानीको नि
साथी बनिदिने इन्द्रेणी

जङ्गल खरानी भएपछि
टुसाउँछ जुन फूल बसन्त बनी

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

शहरको चर्‍को कोलाहललाई
चिरेर गाउने सुस्केरी
गल्ली-गल्लीभित्रका चोकसरी
एक पहेली हौ, नयाँ दुनियाँ पनि

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

बसन्तको गोँधूलीको अँगालोसरी
न्यानो छौ तिमी
मेरी उजेली

जूनकी सङ्गिनी, बगैँचाझैँ रङ्गीली,
कथाझैँ छौ तिमी, मेरी उजेली

मेरी उजेली तिमी, मेरी उजेली
मेरी उजेली तिमी, तिमी मेरी उजेली


Sarangi: Kiran Maharjan
Recording Studio: Project Studio Productions

Sponsored By: CocaCola Nepal 
Food Partner:  Jiffy Services
Media Partner: No Next Question 


Visuals  by: Kathaharu
Cast:
Rajasi 
Rashmi Bhatta
Shantidoot Pandey
Laxmi Nath Timilsina
Director: Shashank Shrestha
Producer: Rocky Prajapati
Director of Photography: Nischal Manandhar

Assistant DOP: Sushant Maharjan, Nischal Maharjan 

Assistant Director: Preshanee Bhattarai

Art Direction, Style and Costume: Krisha Joshi, Shrayesha Vajracharya

Line Producer and BTS: Uguess Ranjit
Location Partners:
Cotton Collection
Marquie Café, Patan
Palate | The House of Flavors
DSA Flower and Gift Shop
Puja Flower Shop

Meri Ujeli is an ode to the brightness and warmth we’ve received from all those we have loved and those who have loved us. 

Stream the HQ Audio here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/meriujeli-pbm

Lyrics:
आकाशले त्यागेको पानीको नि
साथी बनिदिने इन्द्रेणी

जङ्गल खरानी भएपछि
टुसाउँछ जुन फूल बसन्त बनी

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

शहरको चर्‍को कोलाहललाई
चिरेर गाउने सुस्केरी
गल्ली-गल्लीभित्रका चोकसरी
एक पहेली हौ, नयाँ दुनियाँ पनि

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

बसन्तको गोँधूलीको अँगालोसरी
न्यानो छौ तिमी
मेरी उजेली

जूनकी सङ्गिनी, बगैँचाझैँ रङ्गीली,
कथाझैँ छौ तिमी, मेरी उजेली

मेरी उजेली तिमी, मेरी उजेली
मेरी उजेली तिमी, तिमी मेरी उजेली

snippet.title: French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
snippet.description:
🎵 Follow the official 7clouds playlist on Spotify : http://spoti.fi/2SJsUcZ
​🎧 French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
⏬ Download / Stream: https://frenchmontana.lnk.to/listenYD
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

❤️ Follow our Spotify playlists: http://bit.ly/7cloudsSpotify

https://www.instagram.com/frenchmontana/?hl=en
https://x.com/FrencHMonTanA

☁️ 7clouds:
https://open.spotify.com/user/7cloudsmusic
https://soundcloud.com/7cloudsmusic

https://twitter.com/7cloudsmusic
https://instagram.com/7clouds
https://tiktok.com/@7clouds
https://7clouds.org

.........
🎤 Lyrics: French Montana - Unforgettable ft. Swae Lee

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f***ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out; Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' s*** you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f**ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Oeh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

 
.........

snippet.title: Tamang Selo - Figure Timro Dami · फिगर तिम्रो दामी - Official MV
snippet.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

Presented by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗺𝘇𝗻  | Music Distribution Partner 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸.

♫ 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
✎ Lyricist: Kumarbmzn 
♪ Music Composer: Bishwo Dong 
🎙 Singer: Bishwo Dong and Shanti Shree Pariyar
🎸 Music Arranger: Bishwo Dong
🎛️ Mixing Master: Dipesh Pradhan
🎧 Rec.: Dong Studio 

🎬 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
🎭 Artist: Rasmila Tamang | Ashish Manandhar 
🎞 Production Manager: Milan Katwal
🧥Wardrobe : Valentino The Boutique 
💅🏻 MUA: Sarita Prajapati
🎥 Cinematographer: Nabaraj Uprety
𓀤𓀥 Viral Step By: Ashish Manandhar
✂ Edit | Color | GFX: Manoj Karki
📽 Choreography | Direction: Mausam Himali 
🖼️ Post Production: Luminous Postwork

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.

snippet.title: Dilip Bishwokarma - Maile Chaheko | Official Music Video |
snippet.description:
Sometimes we love someone quietly and deeply. 
A one-sided love that lives in our hearts, unexpressed, untold and unspoken feelings. 
This song comes from a love I kept in my heart back in school time. I never expressed what I felt for her, so the music became my voice.

This song is for all those hidden feelings,For the love we feel but can’t say aloud.If you’ve ever loved someone silently, this song is for you too.

Song Credit
Vocal/Lyrics - Dilip Bishwokarma 
Composed - Dilip And The Valley Crew
Drum - Carey Maharjan 
Guitar - Nidiv Kayastha
Bass - Sajiv Shrestha
Flute - Swarnim Maharjan
Keys - Miraj Shrestha
Recorded at Capsule Corp. Studio
Production, Mixing and Mastering - Ragyan Shrestha
Drum take ( Studio Nepal ) 
Project head/Band manager - Carey Maharjan

Video team 
DOP :Fumu/Prabish Newa
Edit/colour : LUFFY

Do follow on
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dilipbishwokarma__  
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/dilipbishwokarma.01
Tiktok:  https://www.tiktok.com/@dilip_bishwokarma7
Spotify :  https://open.spotify.com/artist/197wrTQ2T07V3C0hITzaqT

Special Thanks 
Anil Ghatane

Sujan Maharjan

snippet.title: 🔱पीछे बाराती आगे बैंड बाजा | गौरा खोल दरवाजा | Shiv Baraat Song 2026 | Maha Shivratri Special Bhajan
snippet.description:
#Shivratri #ShivBaraat #HarHarMahadev
महाशिवरात्रि की पावन बेला पर प्रस्तुत है शिव–पार्वती विवाह की दिव्य झांकी।
“पीछे बाराती आगे बैंड बाजा, गौरा खोल दरवाजा” – यह भजन भोलेनाथ की बारात की अद्भुत छवि प्रस्तुत करता है।

कैलाश से चली शिव की बारात, नंदी पर सवार महादेव, पीछे गणों की टोली, देवताओं की पुष्प वर्षा और द्वार पर खड़ी माता पार्वती…

इस पावन भजन को सुनकर आप भी बोल उठेंगे –
🙏 हर हर महादेव 🙏

यह भजन समर्पित है सभी शिव भक्तों को।
महाशिवरात्रि पर इस दिव्य विवाह का आनंद लें और अपने जीवन में शिव–शक्ति की कृपा प्राप्त करें।

अगर भजन पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
🔔 Channel Subscribe करें
📢 Share जरूर करें

जय भोलेनाथ 🔱

shiv baraat song
maha shivratri bhajan 2026
piche barati aage band baja
gaura khol darwaza bhajan
shiv parvati vivah song
shivratri special bhajan
har har mahadev song
new shiv bhajan 2026
shiv shakti amar milan
bhole baba baraat

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

👉 𝑺𝒖𝒃𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒆 𝒕𝒐 @𝑹𝑫𝑪𝑴𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒓𝒐𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝒉𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆𝒔!

snippet.title: Phsyco – Andhakar Jivan | Feat. Jung Ji & Vol Quake | (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Andhakar Jivan by Phsyco featuring Jung Ji & Vol Quake is a nepali rap song that reflects inner battles, broken dreams, and the silent pain hidden in everyday life. This emotional Nepali hip hop track explores psychological struggles, social hypocrisy, and the search for truth in a world where faith, humanity, and hope are constantly questioned. A raw and intense anthem representing real Nepali rap culture and underground hip hop. 🕯️🔥

🎵 Song Credits
Produced by Vol Quake
Mixed & Mastered by Vol Quake
Performed by Phsyco, Jung Ji & Vol Quake

🎬 Video Credits
Shot by Zen
Color  & Edit by Vol Quake

🤝 Support
Supported by Hood Wears

🔔 Stay connected for the full release [13 February ,2026]

💛 Special Thanks To: TG Gang and Phsyco Brothers

snippet.title: Ruth B. - Dandelions (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Ruth B. - Dandelions
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
Maybe it's the way you say my name
Maybe it's the way you play your game
But it's so good, I've never known anybody like you
But it's so good, I've never dreamed of nobody like you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]
I think that you are the one for me
Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so happy

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

snippet.title: Billie Eilish - BIRDS OF A FEATHER (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
"Billie Eilish - BIRDS OF A FEATHER (Lyrics)"

🎧 Download/Stream: 

Lyrics:
[Intro]
(I want you to stay)

[Verse 1]
I want you to stay
'Til I'm in the grave
'Til I rot away, dead and buried
'Til I'm in the casket you carry
If you go, I'm goin' too, uh
'Cause it was always you (Alright)
And if I'm turnin' blue, please don't save me
Nothin' left to lose without my baby

[Refrain]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone
Can't change the weather, might not be forever
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
It might not be long, but baby, I

[Chorus]
I'll love you 'til the day that I die
'Til the day that I die
'Til the light leaves my eyes
'Til the day that I die

[Verse 2]
I want you to see, hmm
How you look to me, hmm
You wouldn't believe if I told ya
You would keep the compliments I throw ya
But you're so full of shit, uh
Tell me it's a bit, oh
Say you don't see it, your mind's polluted
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
Might not be long, but baby, I
Don't wanna say goodbye

[Chorus]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know ('Til the day that I die)
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone ('Til the light leaves my eyes)
Can't change the weather, might not be forever ('Til the day that I die)
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Post-Chorus]
I knew you in another life
You had that same look in your eyes
I love you, don't act so surprised

snippet.title: Sushant Bhujel - Ek Choti ft.Sujana Syangbo & Sujan Moktan  (OFFICIAL MV)
snippet.description:
“Ek Choti” – This song is about a village boy and girl who fall in love. Their love is pure and strong, but the girl’s father does not accept their relationship. Because of this, they face many problems and feel heartbroken. In the end, they decide to run away together so they can stay united and protect their love.

The music video was shot in Lurpung village, showing the natural beauty, simple village life, and the true feelings of young love.

🟢Stream this song on:
https://ditto.fm/ek-choti

🎤 Vocals : Myself (Sushant Bhujel Tamang)
https://www.instagram.com/sushant_bhuzel/

https://open.spotify.com/artist/64sKQq4agX9GHUkeQIsfRx?si=G7XDeFaoSV6AgiZMFbN4qg
https://www.tiktok.com/@sushant.bhujel2
💸Producer: Top Bdr Bhujel
🎶 Outro Vocals: Sujan Moktan
🎶 Female Vocals : Aakriti Dulal
https://www.instagram.com/aakriti_dulal/

🎼 Music Produced and mix/Mastering: Kila Music
https://www.instagram.com/kilamusic4u/

🎬Visuals: Plug Substance
https://www.instagram.com/plug.substance/

DOP and cinematographer : Sujab Banjara
https://www.instagram.com/sujav_banjara/
Directed By Nemey Youngin
https://www.instagram.com/nemeyyoungins/

Cast: Sujana Syangbo & Sujan Moktan
https://www.instagram.com/sujana_syangbo/
https://www.instagram.com/kilamusic4u/

Choreography: Salav Maharjan and Sujana Syangbo
Makeup Artist: Evani Khadgi
 https://www.instagram.com/evanikhadgilama/

🎤 Recorded at : Clouds Records 
https://www.instagram.com/clouds_records_official/

🏫Location : Lurpung, Karve
Side Casts: Salav Maharjan, Sushant Bhujel, Manisha Shrestha, Prakriti Pakhrin, Evani Khadgi, Basil Gurung, Nima lama, Chyangba Maya lama

I’ve poured my memories and emotions into this one—hope it touches your heart too. 💙


Special Thanks To :
Laxman Bal, Adarsh, Amir  Moktan, 


Uploading this channel's content without permission from Sushant Bhujel is strictly prohibited.
For business inquiries sushantbusiness725@gmail.com
Please Like, Share and Subscribe our channel for more content.
All Rights Reserved by Sushant Bhujel © 2025
